calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Continued To May-12-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Jeremy Cloyd, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Regina Serapio and Ramon Serapio.
Plaintiffs were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Eric Tallman, sued as Doe 2.
Default entered against defendant - 12/19/07.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs Regina Serapio and Ramon Serapio, and against the Defaulted Defendant Eric Tallman, sued as Doe 2 as follows:

Damages/Principal as to Regina Serapio - $400,000.00.
Costs as to Regina Serapio - $204.50, for a total of $400,204.50

Damages/Principal as to Ramon Serapio - $400,000.00.
Costs as Ramon Serapio - 204.50, for a total of $400,204.50.

Judgments were submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Continued To Apr-01-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Order Determining Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS REGINA SERAPIO, ROGACIANO SERAPIO AND RAMON SERAPIO'S (WITH DEFENDANT REMY PHAOPHONGSAVATHE) MOTION TO ORDER DETERMINING GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: DENISE DOUCETTE, CSR 5963.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Continued To Jan-28-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Dec-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Lavena Ward, #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances
Petitioner/mother, Regina Serapio, is present as Guardian for Catherine Serapio, a minor Claimant, who is also present.
Attorneys, Jremey Gloyd and Sanford Michael Cipinko, appearing on behalf of the petitioner and claimant.

This cause came on calendar this day for a Minor's Compromise. The Court, having heard oral evidence from counsel and having reviewed the documents submitted, the Court GRANTS the Petition and compromise is approved. The total gross amount of the settlement in favor of the claimant is $25,000.00. From the total judgment, payment of fees is to be disbursed as follows: attorneys fees in the sum of $6,250.00 payable to the Law Offices of Sanford M. Cipinko, Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses expenses paid by the petitioner or attorney in the sum of $4,713.80

The balance of the judgment available for the claimant after payment of all allowed fess and expenses is $14,036.20, which is to deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 227 S. San Antonio Road, Los Altos, CA. 94022. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years old.

Order Approving Compromise of Disputed Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed by Commissioner Sue Kaplan in open court.
